title: hieracium subcaesium subsp. lobulatum
intro: Hieracium subcaesium subsp. lobulatum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family and known for its distinctive appearance with yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium subcaesium subsp. lobulatum include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subcaesium subsp. lobulatum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
